title: Embodied AI Project Dashboard
subtitle: World models, self-improving simulators, teleop acceleration, and robotics + 3D printing

summary.focus: Research 主线保持 Tri-View/Image-Layered IDM、Self-Improving Agents 和 DexGello；Survey TODO 已统一 inactive/archived，不再显示为当前执行队列。
summary.progress: Survey cleanup: 所有 Survey 下的未完成 TODO 已标记 inactive/archived；Model-Assisted Teleoperation 根据 ICRA 2026 Foundational World Models failure-detection poster移入 Archive。
summary.blockers: 关键风险从“能不能生成视频”升级为“分层数据是否稳定、可重组、可用于 IDM / reward / policy ablation”。
summary.next: 当前执行重点回到 Research / Engineering：Tri-View layered-data utility、DexGello 数据采集/控制栈、Real-Robot Demos 的真机场景表、Real-Robot Infra 的可用性和安全门控。

storyline.summary: How real-robot infra, human demonstrations, video world models, simulators, and physical outputs form one loop.

nodes.title: Real-Robot Data Infra
nodes.body: ARX, UMI, Cobot Magic, Linker hands, gloves, VIVE Tracker, and Franka + Wuji provide the hardware base for collection, calibration, and validation.

nodes.title: Video + HOI World Modeling
nodes.body: UMI wrist views, robot-head ego videos, layered manipulation state, same-task HOI data, and rate-curve teleop research turn human operation into structured video, inferred action, and state data.

nodes.title: Self-Improving Sim + Physical Products
nodes.body: Agentic Real2Sim2Real-VLA evaluation, generated assets, household tasks, simulator rollouts, robot evaluation, and language / image-to-CAD design close the loop back into real-world experiments.

flows.title: How Tri-View becomes layered robot data for IDM, reward, and adaptation

nodes.title: UMI Ego World
nodes.body: Generate synchronized action-conditioned robot videos from UMI wrist views plus fixed/floating robot-head ego context. This track owns WAN/Cosmos/Gamma baselines and robot-video galleries.

nodes.title: Robot Video Layers
nodes.body: Decompose real or generated robot videos into temporally consistent robot, object/contact, and background layers with masks, recomposition QA, and structured metadata.

nodes.title: Layered Data Utility
nodes.body: Robot layer feeds IDM / pose / VO, object layer feeds process reward and RL supervision, and background layer feeds RoboEngine-style adaptation. The ablation asks whether layered data beats flat RGB or masks alone.

visual_references.caption: Real-robot infra: ARX, Franka + Wuji Hand, UMI, Linker Hand, gloves, and VIVE Tracker.

visual_references.alt: Layered robot data hierarchy: background, object, and robot layers feed augmentation, reward, and inverse dynamics.
visual_references.caption: Layered robot data hypothesis: background -> augmentation/adaptation, object/contact -> process reward, robot -> IDM and pose/VO supervision.

visual_references.alt: RoboTwin2 Text2Env workflow showing natural-language task parsing, SceneSmith-lite agents, asset checking, Text2Env JSON, RoboTwin task generation, deployment, data collection, policy training, and evaluation.
visual_references.caption: RoboTwin2 Text2Env workflow: natural-language tabletop task -> SceneSmith-lite placement agents -> asset check / optional adapter -> Text2Env JSON -> RoboTwin task program -> data collection -> policy training and evaluation.

visual_references.alt: ASPIRE Robot Execution Engine screenshot showing a physical-engine layer with LIBERO, RoboSuite, BEHAVIOR, and real-robot examples.
visual_references.caption: ASPIRE context: robot execution engine and physical-engine view, useful as the direct prior for rollout-trace debugging and skill-library self-improvement; PEARL should differentiate with Open X Sim / Any Sim Transfer and scene-task decoupling.

visual_references.alt: Embodied harness loop diagram showing weakness mining, harness proposal, proposal validation, and accepted harness updates around a fixed model.
visual_references.caption: Self-Improving / PEARL harness framing: run current harness on embodied tasks, mine failure traces, propose harness edits, regression-test candidates, and promote accepted edits into the next harness iteration.

visual_references.alt: Robotics and 3D printing product design platform
visual_references.caption: Robotics + 3D printing: generated structure exported toward printable parts, printer-farm takeout, and assembly.

visual_references.alt: Drag-teaching robot data video editing and hand removal
visual_references.caption: Drag-demo editing: ARX egg-cracking data, Kling hand removal, and diff-map QA.

visual_references.alt: HOI diverse dataset with ego camera, hand pose, and depth
visual_references.caption: Diverse same-task HOI data: ego RGB, hand pose, and z16 depth.

visual_references.alt: Real2Sim2Real reconstruction and hierarchical physics simulation pipeline
visual_references.caption: R2S2R reconstruction reference: input video -> SuGaR reconstruction -> mesh / Gaussian surfaces -> physics-aware simulation and rendering.

visual_references.alt: UMI dataset annotation and subtask segmentation visualization panel
visual_references.caption: UMI dataset QA: synchronized wrist views, 3D pose, EEF traces, current segment, and action log after subtask splitting.

visual_references.alt: MaskWAM annotation pipeline using language annotation, VLM object extraction, SAM3 mask propagation, point prompts, and human verification to produce labeled episodes.
visual_references.caption: MaskWAM annotation pipeline reference: language labels -> task-relevant objects -> SAM3 mask propagation -> human verification -> labeled episodes.

visual_references.alt: GenRobot UMI monitor demo with dual wrist views, 3D viewer, and timestamped episode metadata
visual_references.caption: UMI monitor demo: dual wrist camera views, 3D gripper visualization, playback timeline, and episode metadata.

visual_references.alt: Shared-Backbone Dual-Branch Wan architecture diagram for UMI Stage 1
visual_references.caption: Former UMI head image kept as Image Context: Shared-Backbone Dual-Branch Wan for Stage 1 dual-wrist video latents, view embeddings, shared Wan2.1 backbone, dual decoded outputs, and cross-view / temporal / state-action consistency losses.

visual_references.alt: Representative Qwen Image-Layered UMI failure sample
visual_references.caption: Representative UMI layer failure context: extra layers still duplicate objects, miss robot structure, and fragment scene/background regions; keep one negative still-frame baseline instead of four near-duplicate images.

visual_references.alt: World model taxonomy comparing reconstruction, next-step prediction, and runnable models across reconstruction, object/3D, and pixel/video levels.
visual_references.caption: World-model taxonomy note: reconstruction, predictive next-step, and runnable simulation are different claims and should not be collapsed.
PEARL-style loop: memory, attribution, co-evolution, governance.

visual_references.alt: Robotics simulator taxonomy comparing task APIs, assets, simulation frameworks, renderers, and physics engines across ManiSkill, SAPIEN, Isaac Sim, OmniGibson, MuJoCo, Habitat, RLBench, and CoppeliaSim.
visual_references.caption: Simulator taxonomy: separate task/API layer, assets, sim framework, renderer, and physics engine when choosing the Text2Env / AgenticSim backend.

visual_references.alt: Real-Robot Lab Infra hardware asset inventory overview showing robot platforms, teleoperation devices, hands, cameras, and UMI equipment readiness states.
visual_references.caption: Real-Robot Lab Infra asset inventory: 16 hardware entries, 11 ready, 4 under setup, 1 N.A.; covers Lingzu arms, Aloha, Franka, YAM, teleop wearable arm, Linker/Wuji/Manus hands, VIVE Tracker, Daimon UMI, L515/D405 cameras, and mobile base hardware.

weekly_briefs.title: Tri-View Ego World + IDM overall proposal
weekly_briefs.summary: Rewrote Tri-View as a two-stage Ego World + IDM foundation-model proposal; 2026-06-21 update backs up the MaskWAM vs UMI memo and folds the SAM3/VLM/human-verification mask pipeline into the global layered dataset selection gate.

rules: dashboard/index.html is a rendered shell; dashboard/state/*.json is the source of truth for project and task content.
Dashboard updates stay limited to project summaries, risks, decisions, and task/TODO state.
Runtime control-plane state belongs outside this repository.
